description: Perform a Bayesian Repeated Measures ANOVA on the Extraversion items (E1, E2, E3, E4, and E5) from /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv to determine if they are endorsed differently. Define a repeated measures factor named 'Item' for these five variables. The analysis should provide BF10 evidence and descriptive plots for the items. Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Extraversion_BayesianANOVA.jasp. Additionally, create a report file at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/rm_anova_results.txt recording the BF10 value from the Model Comparison table and identifying the item (E1-E5) with the highest mean score.
